name: pm-data-analytics
description: Data analytics skills for PMs covering the full analytics stack: A/B test analysis with statistical and practical significance frameworks, cohort analysis with retention benchmarks and curve diagnosis, funnel analysis with drop-off prioritization and instrumentation guidance, feature adoption analysis with Aha moment identification and retirement signals, growth accounting with quick ratio and Net Revenue Retention, product metrics dashboard design with North Star hierarchy and alert thresholds, production-ready SQL patterns for BigQuery/Snowflake/Redshift, and expert-mode data analysis covering problem framing, data quality, and all major analytical patterns. Works for any digital product — SaaS, marketplace, consumer app, or subscription service.
